subject: An armored ogre knight standing in a forested clearing, gripping a massive two-handed sword and wearing battered plate armor
description: A hulking ogre clad in heavy, dented plate armor stands in a wooded clearing, both hands gripping the hilt of an enormous sword whose blade rests at his side. His tusked face is turned slightly downward in a brooding, weary expression, dark eyes shadowed beneath the brow of a battered helm. Pauldrons, gauntlets, and a chest cuirass are scuffed and worn — the armor of a long-roving warrior rather than a polished court knight. The background is washed in a hot crimson palette: ember-red foliage, smoldering tree trunks, and a hazy hellish light that bleeds across the entire frame, giving the scene the look of a forest at sunset or under firelight. A muted blue-gray shows through only at the figure's metal armor and skin, otherwise the whole composition is drenched in red.
background: red-lit forest with dark tree trunks and hazy crimson atmosphere
emotion: weary, brooding, downcast — a tired warrior rather than a raging brute
